name: flash-sale-sba
description: Flash Sale System using Space-Based Architecture with Node.js and Redis

scripts.install:all: npm install && cd services/product-service && npm install && cd ../cart-service && npm install && cd ../order-service && npm install && cd ../inventory-service && npm install && cd ../user-service && npm install
scripts.start:all: concurrently "npm run dev:product" "npm run dev:cart" "npm run dev:order" "npm run dev:inventory" "npm run dev:user"
